defaults.hook_cover_term: a tight close up of Lionel Messi's face celebrating intensely in an Argentina blue and white jersey, his face filling the frame, screaming with joy, sharp and clear

videos.video_subject: Messi quit the Argentina national team in 2016 after losing the Copa America final on penalties saying he was done forever - millions begged him to return and he came back to win the 2022 World Cup
videos.video_script: Messi quit international football. Said he was done — forever. Millions begged him to return. He came back. And won the World Cup six years later. Which makes you wonder,
videos.video_terms: Messi Argentina celebration close up, Messi World Cup trophy lift, Messi crying emotional Argentina, Messi comeback story greatest, Messi Argentina screaming celebration, Messi World Cup 2022 face close up, Messi Argentina jersey winning, Messi Qatar 2022 champion celebration, Messi emotional moment Argentina, Messi greatest player World Cup
